channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Verizon signs deal with Google worth over $1 billion reut.rs…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Verizon signs deal with Google worth over $1 billion reut.rs/4pCSPhH
item.content:encoded: Verizon signs deal with Google worth over $1 billion reut.rs/4pCSPhH

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム はてなでコミケが一切批判されないのって100%ポジショントークだよな 真夏.. はてなでコミケが…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
はてなでコミケが一切批判されないのって100%ポジショントークだよな 真夏..

はてなでコミケが一切批判されないのって100%ポジショントークだよな 真夏に開催 屋外で待ち行列 人数過多でコミケ雲 毎年熱中症患者多発 これでも、期間変更、場所変更、人数制限はなし ↑が男性アイドルイベントだったら？ スポーツ大会だったら？ モーターショーだったら？ 絶対ボロクソ叩いて中止になるまで粘着するだろ
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
はてなでコミケが一切批判されないのって100%ポジショントークだよな 真夏..

はてなでコミケが一切批判されないのって100%ポジショントークだよな 真夏に開催 屋外で待ち行列 人数過多でコミケ雲 毎年熱中症患者多発 これでも、期間変更、場所変更、人数制限はなし ↑が男性アイドルイベントだったら？ スポーツ大会だったら？ モーターショーだったら？ 絶対ボロクソ叩いて中止になるまで粘着するだろ

item.title: Newsweek's America's Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Famil…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description:
Newsweek's America's Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families 2026 ranking recognizes employers leading in flexibility, caregiver support and family-friendly benefits.

See the ranking: rankings.newsweek.com/ameri...

#WorkingParents #FutureOfWork #HR
item.content:encoded:
Newsweek's America's Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families 2026 ranking recognizes employers leading in flexibility, caregiver support and family-friendly benefits.

See the ranking: rankings.newsweek.com/ameri...

#WorkingParents #FutureOfWork #HR

item.title: Investors fret that spiking oil prices and rising yields cou…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Investors fret that spiking oil prices and rising yields could threaten stock rally reut.rs/4wkqXBj
item.content:encoded: Investors fret that spiking oil prices and rising yields could threaten stock rally reut.rs/4wkqXBj

item.title: In Going Private, our twice-weekly newsletter on private mar…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: In Going Private, our twice-weekly newsletter on private markets, we bring you news of the first ‘haystack alts’ funds from a Blackstone, Vanguard and Wellington Management alliance aspiring to revolutionize retirement investment
item.content:encoded: In Going Private, our twice-weekly newsletter on private markets, we bring you news of the first ‘haystack alts’ funds from a Blackstone, Vanguard and Wellington Management alliance aspiring to revolutionize retirement investment

item.title: It’s the largest number of measles cases the U.S. has seen i…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: It’s the largest number of measles cases the U.S. has seen in 35 years, and comes amid a decadeslong slide in childhood vaccination rates. The majority of infected people — 93%, according to the CDC — are unvaccinated.
item.content:encoded: It’s the largest number of measles cases the U.S. has seen in 35 years, and comes amid a decadeslong slide in childhood vaccination rates. The majority of infected people — 93%, according to the CDC — are unvaccinated.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第4話]口に関するアンケート - 背筋/押見修造 | 少年ジャンプ＋ 口に関するアンケート 背…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第4話]口に関するアンケート - 背筋/押見修造 | 少年ジャンプ＋

口に関するアンケート 背筋/押見修造 <毎週土曜更新>「肝試しになんて行かなければ、杏は死ななかったと思いますから」心霊スポットとして知られる墓地に、肝試しに行った大学生たち。しかしその1ヶ月後、参加者の1人である杏が自殺してしまう。肝試しの夜にあったことをそれぞれが語っていくうちに、彼らが隠しているも...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第4話]口に関するアンケート - 背筋/押見修造 | 少年ジャンプ＋

口に関するアンケート 背筋/押見修造 <毎週土曜更新>「肝試しになんて行かなければ、杏は死ななかったと思いますから」心霊スポットとして知られる墓地に、肝試しに行った大学生たち。しかしその1ヶ月後、参加者の1人である杏が自殺してしまう。肝試しの夜にあったことをそれぞれが語っていくうちに、彼らが隠しているも...

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [19話]ニシトーキョーメタルブラザーズ - 瀬澤ノブコ | 少年ジャンプ＋ ニシトーキョーメタ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[19話]ニシトーキョーメタルブラザーズ - 瀬澤ノブコ | 少年ジャンプ＋

ニシトーキョーメタルブラザーズ 瀬澤ノブコ <毎週土曜更新！最新2話無料>北海道美瑛に暮らす高校生のハルオ。感情表現が苦手だった少年時代に、彼の心を奪ったのはメタルだった。それ以来、日々研鑽を重ねていたが、具体的な進路について考え始めて――…!?　『ストロングスドウくん』の瀬澤ノブコが描くメタル青春譚、開...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[19話]ニシトーキョーメタルブラザーズ - 瀬澤ノブコ | 少年ジャンプ＋

ニシトーキョーメタルブラザーズ 瀬澤ノブコ <毎週土曜更新！最新2話無料>北海道美瑛に暮らす高校生のハルオ。感情表現が苦手だった少年時代に、彼の心を奪ったのはメタルだった。それ以来、日々研鑽を重ねていたが、具体的な進路について考え始めて――…!?　『ストロングスドウくん』の瀬澤ノブコが描くメタル青春譚、開...

item.title: The WHCA dinner goes forward Friday night with tighter secur…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
The WHCA dinner goes forward Friday night with tighter security, a smaller guest list, and ongoing tensions as Trump's administration tries to weaken news media (Brian Stelter/CNN)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
The WHCA dinner goes forward Friday night with tighter security, a smaller guest list, and ongoing tensions as Trump's administration tries to weaken news media (Brian Stelter/CNN)

item.title: Odysseus could have offered timeless advice before Trump cre…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)

item.title: “Maxxing” is an online trend applied to advice for aspects o…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: “Maxxing” is an online trend applied to advice for aspects of health including sleep, diet and fertility. But much of this maxxing advice can be unhelpful or unhealthy or go against the steady, personalized changes many experts recommend. https://cnn.it/4c27SvE
item.content:encoded: “Maxxing” is an online trend applied to advice for aspects of health including sleep, diet and fertility. But much of this maxxing advice can be unhelpful or unhealthy or go against the steady, personalized changes many experts recommend. https://cnn.it/4c27SvE

item.title: Mayor Zohran Mamdani of New York City announced that the Bur…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani of New York City announced that the Bureau of Coastal Resilience would increase its budget to more than $43 million in coming years. The agency is responsible for addressing the effects of climate change in the city. nyti.ms/3TRBJRe
item.content:encoded: Mayor Zohran Mamdani of New York City announced that the Bureau of Coastal Resilience would increase its budget to more than $43 million in coming years. The agency is responsible for addressing the effects of climate change in the city. nyti.ms/3TRBJRe

item.title: BREAKING: South Carolina is poised to hold the first Democra…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: BREAKING: South Carolina is poised to hold the first Democratic presidential nominating contest in 2028, after the DNC's powerful rules committee moved to keep the state at the front of the line.
item.content:encoded: BREAKING: South Carolina is poised to hold the first Democratic presidential nominating contest in 2028, after the DNC's powerful rules committee moved to keep the state at the front of the line.

item.title: The Israeli military began preparations for a large-scale op…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The Israeli military began preparations for a large-scale operation in the occupied West Bank on Friday after four Palestinians and two Israelis were killed in clashes there.
item.content:encoded: The Israeli military began preparations for a large-scale operation in the occupied West Bank on Friday after four Palestinians and two Israelis were killed in clashes there.

item.title: Extreme heat in Europe has left the Rhine River at criticall…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Extreme heat in Europe has left the Rhine River at critically low levels, driving up the cost of commercial deliveries along the key waterway.
item.content:encoded: Extreme heat in Europe has left the Rhine River at critically low levels, driving up the cost of commercial deliveries along the key waterway.

item.title: New bipartisan legislation aiming to help aging Americans wo…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New bipartisan legislation aiming to help aging Americans would require companies to disclose when users are interacting with AI.
item.content:encoded: New bipartisan legislation aiming to help aging Americans would require companies to disclose when users are interacting with AI.

item.title: #🔖世の中 資金流出事案について特別調査委員会による調査報告書を開示しました - はてな2代目社長のブログ 株式会社…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
資金流出事案について特別調査委員会による調査報告書を開示しました - はてな2代目社長のブログ

株式会社はてな代表取締役社長の栗栖です。 4/24に開示した資金流出事案について、多くの方にご心配やご迷惑をおかけいたしました。大変申し訳ありません。 本事案について、5/7に特別調査委員会を設置し、委員会による調査を行っていました。 先程（7/24）調査報告書（開示版）を受領しましたので、下記のとおりIR開示...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
資金流出事案について特別調査委員会による調査報告書を開示しました - はてな2代目社長のブログ

株式会社はてな代表取締役社長の栗栖です。 4/24に開示した資金流出事案について、多くの方にご心配やご迷惑をおかけいたしました。大変申し訳ありません。 本事案について、5/7に特別調査委員会を設置し、委員会による調査を行っていました。 先程（7/24）調査報告書（開示版）を受領しましたので、下記のとおりIR開示...

item.title: French officials ordered the evacuation of the Cap Ferret pe…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: French officials ordered the evacuation of the Cap Ferret peninsula, a popular holiday destination, as wildfires spread in France and Spain. High temperatures across Western Europe have exacerbated the ferocity of the blazes. nyti.ms/4yLe4SL
item.content:encoded: French officials ordered the evacuation of the Cap Ferret peninsula, a popular holiday destination, as wildfires spread in France and Spain. High temperatures across Western Europe have exacerbated the ferocity of the blazes. nyti.ms/4yLe4SL

item.title: LeBron James announced his decision to join the Philadelphia…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: LeBron James announced his decision to join the Philadelphia 76ers for his record-extending 24th NBA season with hopes of helping the franchise snap a 43-year championship drought reut.rs/4pF9oth
item.content:encoded: LeBron James announced his decision to join the Philadelphia 76ers for his record-extending 24th NBA season with hopes of helping the franchise snap a 43-year championship drought reut.rs/4pF9oth

item.title: Saudi Arabia struck a long-sought deal with the US to establ…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Saudi Arabia struck a long-sought deal with the US to establish a civilian nuclear program, but skeptics warn that the deal, if it holds, compounds the risk of a nuclear arms race in a volatile part of the world
item.content:encoded: Saudi Arabia struck a long-sought deal with the US to establish a civilian nuclear program, but skeptics warn that the deal, if it holds, compounds the risk of a nuclear arms race in a volatile part of the world

item.title: There's no body camera footage of the shooting of Corey Ruiz…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: There's no body camera footage of the shooting of Corey Ruiz because the Madison police officers aren't required to wear them.
item.content:encoded: There's no body camera footage of the shooting of Corey Ruiz because the Madison police officers aren't required to wear them.

item.title: Wedding gift registries are great – but divorce registries w…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Wedding gift registries are great – but divorce registries would be a lifesaver | Nick Dothée
item.content:encoded: Wedding gift registries are great – but divorce registries would be a lifesaver | Nick Dothée
